name: @memberjunction/livekit-room-server
description: MemberJunction: Server-side LiveKit room support — mints scoped client/bot access tokens (livekit-server-sdk) and provides the session-start coordinator that opens a realtime model session and bridges it into a LiveKit room via AIBridgeEngine. The MJ realtime-bridge ↔ LiveKit UI seam.
author: MemberJunction.com
